name: Dogleg North
about: Dogleg North is an indoor golf facility located in Fargo, ND, offering a welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels. The venue utilizes ultra high-definition golf simulators with over 600 courses available and provides swing data monitors for in-depth analysis. It caters to a diverse clientele, offering league play, professional lessons, and event rental options. The facility promotes a community-driven atmosphere, aiming to provide the best indoor golf experience in the Fargo-Moorhead area while also being inviting to non-golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Ultra high-definition golf simulators with over 600 courses
Access to professional instructors and detailed swing data analysis
Multiple league options, including Spring Doubles and Singles leagues
Welcoming environment for all skill levels, from beginners to serious golfers
Potential for events and private rentals with a community-focused vibe

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy mentioned as community-driven service
BYOB policy mentioned as community-driven service

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if rental clubs are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact them directly to inquire about rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue appears to operate on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, as they are described as community-driven with a welcoming environment.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole round. The time can vary based on simulator software and player pace, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dogleg North promotes making youth golf more accessible and has instructors focused on growing the game for younger players, indicating a family-friendly environment.
